rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KANDIE DOTSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 19, 2017 (first available Judge Stewart date that allows for proper notice). counsel filed a second amendment to the petition on 3/20/17. an amendment to a petition requires the same notice of hearing as the petition it amends (CRC 7.53.a). notice must be mailed no later than 4/4/17 and POS filed by 4/14/17 in order to avoid another automatic continuance.
